summary_text: Findings: - High: the finalize job assumes the orchestration repo workspace and hard-coded backup defaults. It checks out the current repo in the finalize job but never passes `GHA_REPO`, `STATE_ROOT`, or `TOOLS_ROOT` into the backup runner, so `scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh` falls back to `cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator` and home-dir state paths. That is brittle for reusable workflows, forks, or any non-default orchestration repo. See [fugue-codex-implement.yml]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L817 ) and [run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L6 ) . - Medium: checkout behavior is not target-repo aware in the finalize path. The implement job correctly checks out `needs.prepare.outputs.target_repo`, but the finalize job always checks out the orchestration repository and then records completion from that workspace. If the intended simulation is “target repo implemented, orchestration repo finalized,” this is fine; if not, the current flow will never expose target-repo checkout regressions. See [fugue-codex-implement.yml]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L766 ) and [fugue-codex-implement.yml]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml#L817 ). - Medium: the current test set is mostly structural and can produce false positives. `tests/test-fugue-codex-implement-kernel-artifacts.sh` only greps workflow text, and `tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh` runs the runner in `--no-gha --dry-run` mode with a stubbed Python module, so it does not exercise real `repository_dispatch`, checkout/push, or cross-repo credential behavior. See [test-fugue-codex-implement-kernel-artifacts.sh]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-fugue-codex-implement-kernel-artifacts.sh#L8 ) and [test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh]( /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh#L34 ). Sign-off recommendation: no sign-off yet for production-like simulation. Require at least one end-to-end run that asserts the finalize job’s env overrides explicitly, or a matrix case where `TARGET_REPO != GITHUB_REPOSITORY`, before treating the integration as validated.
